name: Xpress Transportation
recent_news: Operating as Xpress NEMT, Inc.; specialty NEMT/senior mobility for Detroit Metro area; no school-bus or SPED-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; pure NEMT/senior mobility. Out of scope for Summit student-transport tuck-in.

name: Safe Care Mobility Svc
districts_or_customers: Greater Capital Region / Albany NY NEMT
recent_news: Operates as non-emergency medical transportation/ambulette in Albany, NY area; no school or SPED student contracts identified.
fit_notes: NEMT/ambulette only; not student transportation. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Monroe School Transportation
owner_or_parent: Summit School Services LLC (former National Express LLC; owned by I Squared Capital)
districts_or_customers: West Rochester NY and Greater NY State districts
recent_news: Acquired by DeCarolis Truck Rental 1996; became part of National Express LLC in 2017; now branded under Summit School Services LLC (nellc.com redirects to summitllc.com). HQ Rochester NY (record's NC/Valley AL address appears to be a data error).
fit_notes: ALREADY part of Summit platform (the acquirer). Not a tuck-in target. Exclude.

name: W L Roenigk Inc
districts_or_customers: 24 western PA school districts including Freeport Area SD (73+ year relationship)
recent_news: Largest privately owned school bus contractor in western PA; 80th anniversary (founded 1945) under 2nd/3rd generation family management; matriarch Jeanne ~89; president Sue Roenigk took over after brother Billy Jr.'s death in 2013; no PE involvement identified.
fit_notes: Premier Summit tuck-in candidate: large family-owned western PA operator (~283 buses + 370 vans, 24 districts, ~580 employees, est. revenue $35M+). Multi-generation aging ownership and matriarch's continued role create classic succession signal. Strong SPED/wheelchair van fleet aligns with Summit's special-needs focus.

name: Super Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: NY metro charter clients (Ridgewood, Queens HQ; Brooklyn and Quincy MA offices)
recent_news: NY-area charter/motorcoach operator (~25 buses, 10+ years in business). Kissimmee FL address in source data appears to be a registered-agent/PO Box mismatch and not an operating location; no school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Charter/motorcoach operator, not a contracted school-bus or SPED operator. Out of scope for Summit student-transport tuck-in.
